title: Model List
description: List of available models with their metadata and status
documentation:
## Purpose
Returns an enumeration of models known to the system, including their availability state, local paths, and repository metadata. This enables model management UIs and orchestrators to present users with a curated set of options.

## When to use
Use this type as the output of any cap that lists models, whether filtered by type, availability, or other criteria. Consumers that need fine-grained per-model information should request individual [Model Availability](https://capdag.com/browse/media:model-availability;textable;record) or [Model Status](https://capdag.com/browse/media:model-status;textable;record) records.

## Notes
The `count` field should equal the length of the `models` array. The optional `filter` field records the query pattern used to produce the list, enabling consumers to display or log the filter applied. Each entry's `local_available` and `remote_available` flags indicate whether the model can be used immediately or requires a download.

local_available.description: Whether the model is available locally

remote_available.description: Whether the model is available remotely

count.description: Total number of models in the list
